title: Beta-Disguise
description: Allows players to disguise as any Minecraft mob Currently in beta, so minor bugs or limitations may exist Future versions will include better animations, effects, and smoother disguise transitions.
body:
📖 What’s this mod?

Beta-Disguise is a fun and interactive plugin that lets players disguise themselves as any mob in Minecraft. You can become a cow, zombie, creeper, or even an iron golem —  just like them! It’s perfect for roleplay, trolling friends, or adding new gameplay twists to your server.

✅ Features:

🔹 Disguise as any mob — Transform into Minecraft creatures like zombies, creepers, endermen, or animals.

🔹 Smooth movement control — Move and look around naturally while disguised; your mob model follows your actions.

🔹 Simple commands & permissions — Easy to use .

🔹 Automatic cleanup — Disguises are safely removed when players leave or disable them.

```
🧭 Commands
   Command	            Description
/disguise <mob>  => Disguise yourself as any living mob (e.g., zombie, cow, creeper).
/disguise off    => Remove your current disguise.
/yugidisguise    => Shows credit
```

🔌 Integrations and Compatibility

🧱 Supported platforms: Bukkit, Spigot, and Paper (tested on Minecraft 1.20+).

⚙️ Server-side only: No client installation or mods required. Players can join using vanilla Minecraft.

🚀 Paper API built-in: Developed against the latest Paper API 1.20.1, ensuring full compatibility and stability.

🧩 Java 17+ support: Compiled and optimized for Java 17 and higher.

🪶 Lightweight design: No heavy dependencies — just plug, play, and disguise instantly.

🔧 No third-party libraries: Fully self-contained for easy integration into any server setup.


❓ How does it work internally?
 i will give update the github repo as soon as possible


 💭 Why would a user want to download it?

Because it’s the perfect way to prank your friends!
With Beta-Disguise, you can instantly transform into any mob and sneak around like a pro.
Imagine walking up as a creeper and suddenly revealing yourself as the player behind it — chaos guaranteed. 🐄💥
Use it to confuse, scare, or trick your friends in the funniest ways possible.
No setup, no lag, just pure prank power — disguise, reveal, laugh, repeat.

📦 Installation

1=> Download the latest version of YugiDisguise.jar from the Modrinth releases page.

2=> Place the file inside your server’s plugins/ folder.

3=> Restart your Minecraft server.

4=> Once loaded, type /yugidisguise to verify that the plugin is active.

5=> You’re ready to /disguise and start pranking your friends! 🎭

💡 No additional setup or dependencies required — works instantly on Bukkit, Spigot, or Paper servers.


📄Summary 
“Disguise as any mob and prank your friends — lightweight, fun, and server-friendly.”

📅 Upcoming Features

🚧 Better mob control — smoother movement syncing while disguised  
✨ Mob sound effects — ambient sounds for realism  
📘 Open-source release — full source code coming soon on GitHub


💬 Join the Community
Got ideas or suggestions for new disguises or features?
Join my Discord server to share feedback, report bugs, or hang out with other players!
